---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: "#002b36"
---

# Welcome 👋

I’m Kiki Kuijjer, a Digital Heritage & Engagement Consultant.

I help libraries, researchers, and cultural organisations digitise collections, improve their digital presence, and communicate science effectively.

Through my work at the University of Southampton and the Ocean Decade Heritage Network, I combine expertise in digital scholarship, social media, website management, and science communication to deliver clear, accessible, and engaging digital content.

# Services
* Freelance consultancy on digital engagement and science communication
* Social media strategy, content creation, and management
* Website updates, design support, and accessibility recommendations
* Science communication and public engagement content

# Latest Blog Posts

Stay updated with my thoughts on digital scholarship, heritage, and ocean science, and explore practical tips for improving online engagement.
